message:
fix(tj8m): implement kernel thread filtering in quick_scan

- Add is_kernel_thread() detection using PPID 0 and 2
- Filter kernel threads by default in quick_scan (unless --include-kernel-threads)
- Add --include-kernel-threads CLI flag to ScanArgs and AgentPlanArgs
- Update policy.default.json: never_kill_ppid now includes [0, 1, 2]
- Update policy.schema.json: allow PPID 0 and add description

Kernel threads are identified by PPID only (not bracket names which
zombie processes also display). kthreadd (PID 2) has PPID 0, all other
kernel threads have PPID 2.

Fixes: process_triage-tj8m

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
